headline: Engageware to Host AI in CX Summit 2026: Showcasing How Regulated Enterprises Move From AI Pilots To Real Business Results
summary: BOSTON, May 14, 2026--Engageware to host a free virtual AI in CX Summit on scaling agentic AI from pilots to measurable business results.

headline: Darwinbox Named a Leader in Gartner® Magic Quadrant for Talent Acquisition Suites
summary: HYDERABAD, India, May 14, 2026--Darwinbox, an AI-native HR technology platform, announced its debut as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Talent Acquisition Suites.
